# Rahul Baberwal - Portfolio Overview

## Identity & Role
Rahul Baberwal is a Backend Developer & Aspiring Data Scientist.
He is currently pursuing an MSc in Computer Science at Mohta College, MGSU Bikaner, and an advanced Major in Artificial Intelligence from IIT Ropar.
He works as a Backend Developer at Groww Per Click.

## Technical Skills
- **Languages:** Python, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, SCSS
- **Backend Frameworks:** Django, Django REST Framework, FastAPI
- **Data & AI:** Machine Learning, scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, NLP/SBERT
- **Infrastructure & Tools:** PostgreSQL, Docker, Redis, Celery, Linux, Git, GitHub, GitLab

## Featured Projects
1. **Movie Explorer AI**: An AI-powered movie recommendation platform with real-time fuzzy search (<150ms), ML personalized suggestions, and multi-language support (FastAPI, Python).
2. **College Website**: A modern, responsive college institution website built with structured layouts and clean typography (HTML, SCSS).
3. **Real-time Backend Engine**: A scalable real-time application architecture featuring distributed task queues and live WebSocket updates (Django, Celery, Redis, Channels).

## Education & Experience
- **Backend Developer @ Groww Per Click** (Aug 2025 – Present)
- **Major in Artificial Intelligence @ IIT Ropar** (Aug 2024 – Oct 2025)
- **MSc Computer Science @ Mohta College, MGSU Bikaner** (2024 - Present)
- **O Level (IT Professional) @ NIELIT** (Jul 2022 – Jan 2024)
